Canvas LMS REST API uses OAuth 2.0 bearer tokens. Endpoints live under
/api/v1/ on the institution's Canvas host (e.g.
https://canvas.instructure.com/api/v1/...). Responses are JSON with
ISO 8601 timestamps, and list endpoints support Link-header pagination.

This specification is a best-effort, hand-authored subset covering the
Courses resource, modeled from the publicly documented Courses API
page (https://canvas.instructure.com/doc/api/courses.html). Canvas has
many additional resources — assignments, quizzes, submissions, users,
enrollments, files, etc. — that are not enumerated here. Refer to the
Canvas API documentation for the full surface area.
